name: Orbit CLI
description: Pure-plumbing wrapper around Orbit's HTTP API. Three tools: orbit_observation_emit (single POST), orbit_observation_bulk (NDJSON file -> chunked POST), orbit_person_get (GET card by UUID). Reads ORBIT_API_URL + ORBIT_API_KEY from env. No LLM calls — the observer/resolver SKILLs own all interpretation.

description.description: Plugin reads two required env vars. ORBIT_API_URL is the fully-qualified base including /api/v1 (e.g. http://100.97.152.84:3047/api/v1). ORBIT_API_KEY is the Bearer token (orb_live_*). Do NOT prepend /api/v1 when invoking tools — it's already in the URL.
